primary_text:
Six months ago, my dog had allergies. I was spending $150 every time we went in.

Then I signed up for Best for Pet. $50/month. Since then: four consults ($0 each), all vaccinations, a blood test, and $250 off her dental.

I have saved over $800 and she is healthier than she has been in years.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess. A wellness plan for routine care at your local vet.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: My dog has allergies. I pay $0 per visit.
description: Save $800+/yr. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Happy dog at vet clinic. Before/after split: worried owner vs relaxed owner. Warm.
